name: Branch Mobile Attribution API
what_it_does: Branch REST API for mobile attribution, deep linking, and cross-channel analytics. Enables AI agents to query attribution data, retrieve campaign performance, access deep link analytics, and integrate mobile measurement into marketing analytics workflows. Branch is a leading mobile measurement and deep linking platform for app-first businesses.
use_cases: Querying mobile app install attribution and campaign ROAS from marketing analytics agents
Retrieving deep link click and conversion data from product analytics agents
Accessing user journey and cross-channel attribution paths from growth intelligence agents
Integrating Branch attribution data into marketing mix modeling and BI agents
not_for: Simple UTM tracking without app deep linking needs
best_when: A mobile app team using Branch wants AI agents to analyze attribution data, surface channel performance, and integrate mobile measurement into growth and marketing analytics workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Mobile attribution data contains device identifiers and user behavior. GDPR, CCPA, and App Tracking Transparency (ATT) compliance required for EU/iOS users.

auth.notes: Branch API key authentication. Branch Key and Branch Secret from dashboard. Export API uses separate credentials.

pricing.paid_tiers: Growth and Enterprise plans; pricing by MAU
pricing.notes: Free tier for small apps. MAU-based pricing scales with app growth.

performance.rate_limits: Branch API: rate limits per app; export API has separate quotas

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Mobile attribution includes device IDs and user behavior — GDPR/CCPA/ATT compliance
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Branch Export API (for bulk data) has separate auth and quotas from standard API
ATT framework on iOS limits attribution data for users who opt out — handle null data
Branch Key (public) vs Branch Secret (private) — keep secret secure
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Device identifiers and mobile user behavior. GDPR, CCPA, Apple ATT compliance required. SOC2. EU data residency. Branch Secret must be secured.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mobile attribution with device IDs and behavioral data. GDPR, CCPA, ATT compliance. SOC2. EU data residency.
